name: sea surface height
fields: ETAN
dataset_description: Parameters include model sea level [ETAN]

name: average 2-dimentional fields for budgets
fields: oceFWflx, SFLUX, TFLUX, oceSPflx, oceQsw, fluxCO2, DIC_surfTend
dataset_description: Parameters include two dimensonal surface freshwater flux [oceFWflx], salt flux [SFLUX], heat flux [TFLUX], salt plume flux [oceSPflx], shortwave radiation flux [oceQsw], CO2 flux [fluxCO2], and DIC tendency due to air-sea exchange [DIC_surfTend]

name: sea-ice and snow concentration and thickness
fields: SIarea, SIheff
dataset_description: Parameters include sea-ice concentration [SIarea], grid-cell averaged sea-ice thickness [SIheff]

name: ocean temperature and salinity
fields: THETA, SALT
dataset_description: Parameters include seawater potential temperature [THETA] and salinity [SALT].

name: major ocean biogeochemical tracers
fields: DIC, NO3, NO2, NH4, PO4, FeT, SiO2, ALK, O2
dataset_description: Parameters include seawater dissolved inorganic carbon [DIC], nitrate [NO3], nitrite [NO2], annomnia [NH4], phosphate [PO4], total dissolved iron [FeT], silicon dioxide [SiO2], alkalinity [ALK], dissolved oxygen [O2]

name: minor ocean biogeochemical tracers
fields: DOC, DON, DOP, DOFe, POC, PON, POP, POFe, POSi, PIC, PFT1_C, PFT2_C, PFT3_C, PFT4_C, PFT5_C, ZFT1_C, ZFT2_C, PFT1_Chl, PFT2_Chl, PFT3_Chl, PFT4_Chl, PFT5_Chl
dataset_description: Parameters include seawater dissolved organic carbon (DOC), dissolved organic nitrate [DON], dissolved organic phosphate [DOP], dissolved organic iron [DOFe], particulate organic carbon [POC], particulate organic nitrogen [PON], particulate organic phosphorous [POP], particulate organic iron [POFe], particulate organic silica [POSi], particulate incorganic carbon [PIC], Phytoplankton Functional Type 1 carbon [PFT1_C], Phytoplankton Functional Type 2 carbon [PFT2_C], Phytoplankton Functional Type 3 carbon [PFT3_C], Phytoplankton Function Type 4 carbon [PFT4_C], Phytoplankton Functional Type 5 carbon [PFT5_C], Zooplankton Functional Type 1 carbon [ZFT1_C], Zooplankton Functional Type 2 carbon [ZF2_C], Phytoplankton Functional Type 1 chlorophyll-a [PFT1_Chl], Phytoplankton Functional Type 2 chlorophyll-a [PFT2_Chl], Phytoplankton Functional Type 3 chlorophyll-a [PFT3_Chl], Phytoplankton Functional Type 4 chlorophyll-a [PFT4_Chl], Phytoplankton Functional Type 5 chlorophyll-a [PFT5_Chl]

name: ocean biogeochemical states
fields: PAR, PP, pH
dataset_description: Parameters include seawater total PAR at layer center [PAR], primary production [PP], potential of hydrogen [pH]

name: ocean three-dimensional volume fluxes
fields: UVELMASS, VVELMASS, WVELMASS
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional ocean volume fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Volume fluxes are calculated by multiplying ocean velocities with wet grid cell areas (i.e., horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate).

name: ocean three-dimensional potential temperature fluxes
fields: ADVx_TH, DFxE_TH, ADVy_TH, DFyE_TH, ADVr_TH, DFrE_TH, DFrI_TH
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional advective and diffusive ocean potential temperature fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate.

name: ocean three-dimensional salinity fluxes
fields: ADVx_SLT, DFxE_SLT, ADVy_SLT, DFyE_SLT, ADVr_SLT, DFrE_SLT, DFrI_SLT, oceSPtnd
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional advective and diffusive ocean salinity fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate.

name: ocean three-dimensional DIC fluxes
fields: ADVxTr01, ADVy_DIC, ADVr_DIC, DFxE_DIC, DFyE_DIC, DFrE_DIC, DFrI_DIC, DIC_tend, DIC_consum, DIC_consum_PIC, respDIC, rDIC_DOC, rDIC_POC, dDIC_PIC
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional advective and diffusive ocean DIC fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate.

name: ocean three-dimensional ALK fluxes
fields: ADVx_ALK, ADVy_ALK, ADVr_ALK, DFxE_ALK, DFyE_ALK, DFrE_ALK, DFrI_ALK, ALK_tend, ALK_consum, ALK_source
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional advective and diffusive ocean ALK fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate.

name: ocean three-dimensional NO3 fluxes
fields: ADVx_NO3, ADVy_NO3, ADVr_NO3, DFxE_NO3, DFyE_NO3, DFrE_NO3, DFrI_NO3, NO3_tend, NO3_consum, NO3_source
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional advective and diffusive ocean NO3 fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate.

name: ocean three-dimensional NO2 fluxes
fields: ADVx_NO2, ADVy_NO2, ADVr_NO2, DFxE_NO2, DFyE_NO2, DFrE_NO2, DFrI_NO2, NO2_tend, NO2_consum, NO2_source
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional advective and diffusive ocean NO2 fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate.

name: ocean three-dimensional NH4 fluxes
fields: ADVx_NH4, ADVy_NH4, ADVr_NH4, DFxE_NH4, DFyE_NH4, DFrE_NH4, DFrI_NH4, NH4_tend, NH4_consum, NH4_source
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional advective and diffusive ocean NH4 fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate.

name: ocean three-dimensional PO4 fluxes
fields: ADVx_PO4, ADVy_PO4, ADVr_PO4, DFxE_PO4, DFyE_PO4, DFrE_PO4, DFrI_PO4, PO4_tend, PO4_consum, PO4_source
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional advective and diffusive ocean PO4 fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate.

name: ocean three-dimensional FeT fluxes
fields: ADVx_FeT, ADVy_FeT, ADVr_FeT, DFxE_FeT, DFyE_FeT, DFrE_FeT, DFrI_FeT, FeT_tend, Fe_consum, Fe_source, sedimentFe, FeTLossFreeLimit
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional advective and diffusive ocean FeT/Fe fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate.

name: ocean two-dimensional Fe fluxes
fields: SolFeDustSurf
dataset_description: Parameters include the two dimensional soluble iron flux at sea surface [SolFeDustSurf]

name: ocean three-dimensional SiO2 fluxes
fields: ADVx_SiO2, ADVy_SiO2, ADVr_SiO2, DFxE_SiO2, DFyE_SiO2, DFrE_SiO2, DFrITr07, SiO2_tend, SiO2_consum, SiO2_source
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional advective and diffusive ocean SiO2 fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate.

name: ocean three-dimensional O2 fluxes
fields: ADVx_O2, ADVy_O2, ADVr_O2, DFxE_O2, DFyE_O2, DFrE_O2, DFrI_O2, O2_tend, O2_consum, O2_source
dataset_description: Parameters include the three dimensional advective and diffusive ocean O2 fluxes in the model x, y, and z-directions. Horizontal fluxes account for partial cells and the time-varying vertical coordinate.

name: ocean two-dimensional O2 fluxes
fields: O2_surfTend
dataset_description: Parameters include the two dimensional O2 surface tendency due to air-sea exchange [O2_surfTend]

name: ocean two-dimensional CO2 flux budget
fields: fluxCO2, DIC_surfTend, apCO2, apCO2sat
dataset_description: Parameters include two dimensional CO2 flux at sea surface [fluxCO2], DIC tendency at sea surface due to air-sea exchange [DIC_surfTend], atmospheric pCO2 [apCO2], and saturated atmospheric pCO2 [apCO2sat]

name: ocean three-dimensional CO2 flux budget
fields: THETA, SALT, DIC, PO4, SiO2, ALK
dataset_description: Parameters include three dimensonal potential temperature [THETA], salinity [SALT], dissolved inorganic carbon [DIC], phosphate [PO4], silicon dioxide [SiO2], and alkalinity [ALK]
